comment.body:
i don't know the future, i know the probabilities and the structure.
ES 6900/10 band is a serious short-term pivot, while 6875/80 is a longer-term one.
ES break and close below this 6875/80 band is trend shifting. 
I wouldn't play upside reversion. Know when to stop. 
We made huuuuuge profit on this downside leg. 
profit is taken, sell order is set, 
desk is left. 
family time
